examples: His promise during the campaign to try to bring the war to an end was a political masterstroke.
SOAP had serious technical shortcomings, but, as a market strategy, it was a masterstroke .
His masterstroke was the reinvention of the Beetle as a modern car, a big seller in Europe and America.
The deal could prove a masterstroke as Turkey's energy market is growing by 8% each year.
It is now clear that initially seemed like a masterstroke was in fact Erdogan's first major misstep.
